hero.headline: From support signals to product decisions.
hero.subheadline: I build analyst-grade outputs from player feedback and operations data, then turn them into prioritized product actions.

kpis.label: Critical Bug/UX Themes
kpis.note: Mapped to P0/P1/P2 with KPI impact

projects.title: Darkest AFK Support Compensation Catalog
projects.context: Darkest AFK support/admin workflows required fast, consistent compensation package assembly.
projects.problem: Manual item lookup and JSON payload preparation created repetitive friction and formatting risk.
method: Added search, filters, bilingual labels, multi-select and quantity controls
Implemented one-click JSON generation and accessibility shortcuts
insights: Deterministic output is more valuable than visual complexity for operators
Presets and bulk actions reduce cognitive load in repetitive support tasks
projects.decision: Ship an interface-first compensation workflow with standardized payload generation.
impact: 112+ indexed items in one searchable catalog

projects.title: Vacation Cafe Simulator Retention Analysis
projects.context: The team needed decision-ready understanding of where cozy gameplay turns into friction.
projects.problem: Player sentiment across community channels was fragmented and hard to convert into product actions.
method: Clustered qualitative feedback into repeatable friction themes
Mapped themes to D1/D7/D30 and session/churn proxies
Built action-oriented hypotheses for short validation cycles
insights: Friction rises around 6-8 hours for a subset of players
Complexity spike around Level 4-5 can break cozy flow
Sensory quality and low-friction interactions strongly affect retention
projects.decision: Create a practical retention recommendation set with KPI mapping and rollout logic.
impact: Converted unstructured discussion into a product-ready analysis artifact
Defined hypotheses for QoL, progression pacing and engagement loops

projects.title: Dig Dig Die Feedback Intelligence Dashboard
projects.context: Dig Dig Die required one structured lens for bugs, UX risk and player feedback priorities.
projects.problem: Raw Steam/Discord/community data was noisy and difficult to prioritize across teams.
dataSources: Structured dashboard HTML and CSV outputs
method: Added priority, effort, risk, horizon and KPI fields
insights: 23 structured items including 6 critical bug/UX issues
3 key feedback themes with business impact
High-risk areas concentrated in coop reliability and onboarding
projects.decision: Deliver backlog-ready prioritization with measurable KPI targets and implementation windows.
impact: Traceable flow from raw feedback to prioritized actions
nextExperiment: Measure Invite Success Rate and D1 over 2 weeks

roadmap.focus: Package evidence and secure internal 20% pilot slot
roadmap.kpi: Pilot scope approved + baseline metrics aligned

roadmap.focus: Run pilot cycle #1 and ship two analytical outputs
roadmap.kpi: At least one decision supported by analysis

roadmap.focus: Pilot readout + transition path or external scale-up
roadmap.kpi: Clear internal path or 10-15% response rate externally

narrative: I operate at the intersection of support reality, player signals, and product prioritization.
Current target role: Product Analyst (games), with focus on retention friction, quality signals, and AI-enabled workflows.
This dashboard is EN-first for hiring managers and product leads, with RU toggle for internal communication.
